name: Karen Pence
subject: Wishing VPOTUS a Happy Birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
A very special birthday is coming up. |
[](http://click1.action.gop.com/tpldmfztcgwkvfvfkbrbzkszjsktjjbrdhvbhlslhbzvcm_nryqrrjppwd_ingznmnv.html?a=1254&b=87573&c=17786605)

Peter,

It has been my true honor and greatest privilege standing by my husband's side as your Second Lady. It has been a remarkable ride.

I wanted to make sure you knew about an important upcoming event, and more importantly, I wanted to give you a chance to personally join us in our celebrations.

**Tomorrow, June 7, 2017, my husband, Vice President Michael Pence will turn 58 years old, and I can 't think of a better way to celebrate than with a birthday card signed by millions of Americans just like you.**

[](http://click1.action.gop.com/sprzsfrgkdjtmfmftchcrtwrlwtgllchzvmcvbwbvcrmkl_nryqrrjppwd_tmwjmvmh.html?a=1254&b=87573&c=17786605)
[SIGN THE CARD](http://click1.action.gop.com/yvqpbrlwgzmnkrkrnftflnylcynwccftpqkfqsysqflkgv_nryqrrjppwd_ingznmnv.html?a=1254&b=87573&c=17786605)
The Vice President would love to see your name, and it would mean the world to our family if you [**added your happy birthday wish by 9:00 PM on June 7, 2017.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/dtcldkpbmngfckckfrwrpfzpszfbssrwlhcrhtzthrpcdg_nryqrrjppwd_ingznmnv.html?a=1254&b=87573&c=17786605)

Thank you, Peter.

[](http://click1.action.gop.com/otlcrgzplvfdwgwgdknkzdszmsdpmmkncjwkjtstjkzwrt_nryqrrjppwd_ddgsdcdh.html?a=1254&b=87573&c=17786605)
Karen Pence
Second Lady of the United States

P.S -- This is my husband's first birthday in the White House, and I'd like to make it one he'll never forget. [**Please, sign his card today.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/rcthtfrsvqjpgfgfpkbkrpyrwypswwkbhngkncycnkrgtr_nryqrrjppwd_kdtfdvdm.html?a=1254&b=87573&c=17786605)

[SIGN THE CARD](http://click1.action.gop.com/phdrctqglsfbmtmtbykyqbwqdwbgddykrjmyjhwhjyqmcj_nryqrrjppwd_wnfzngnv.html?a=1254&b=87573&c=17786605)

Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click1.action.gop.com/lmhfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmgdkjwd_nryqrrjppwd_wnfzngnv.html?a=17786605) | [Unsubscribe](http://click1.action.gop.com/nywcrhybpzwndhdhntmtyngyjgnbjjtmcfdtfqgqftydrd_nryqrrjppwd_orfmrwrj.html?a=17786605)

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
1600 Daily Everything White House for 6/6/2017. |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a16c678218cbbaf9397c7cb4ca6b4fffe27e6858376696d04265129fbbe1d28f46efc5d0f23a9110f707bae9627f0a599b

The impact of Obamacare’s failure on all Americans is real: higher costs, more taxes, and fewer choices. Congress must act and provide relief to the American people from the disaster that is Obamacare by providing healthcare reform that is affordable, accessible, and empowers patients in choosing their own care from their own doctors.

Today's Events

11:00 AM: President Trump meets with National Security Advisor H.R. McMaster

2:00 PM: Press Briefing with Press Secretary Sean Spicer -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a183c2cae79e0a762341c7a93da5dd58e50522d62a62bfdbb750356cf092fdfa2dab2c3e47c6914cf39424e122b00961e5
Watch

3:00 PM: President Trump meets with House and Senate Leadership

4:30 PM: President Trump signs a bill

6:30 PM: President Trump has dinner with Members of Congress

Photo of the Day

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a12b598d2f8450e8c8223877c1ba9baa44664cfd9fecf4a15afe06ce9d69d31a4086bb30edc86ff590a676a560bd67f04a

The East Room | June 5, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

WHITE HOUSE UPDATES

Yesterday, President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a1ff919cf0a4b2f55cff1aa702817f922b8882a339f23c19a483b18909c9c28d14fcef1744e3b201fcc503eb9fc4c5868f
announced his support of a proposal to shift the air traffic control function of the Federal Aviation Administration to an independent, non-profit, non-governmental organization. Secretaries of Transportation from three different administrations - Republican and Democrat -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a130cff369dc239f1496d1f3db622bb6bc0de628c99fc0fa689d44eb8a6017474b7647b2d3ac28f9eb85e1967d72331f52
praised President Trump's plan.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a17e410b172a27a753d9468123c247d42c9d4b972222ecb9c3f80e3729caf9520727ebac6a30b280d2f7571f103d092fd1

President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a1e78534e5ca3b53317e2d68d688f6c68e302733768fcfc43c85e909f4a66f8878f0d27898511ddf996203677c84b4ccd5
sent a letter to Members of Congress detailing the Administration's principles for reforming the Nation's Air Traffic Control System.

Yesterday, President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a17d3c2b1e2bc5b7e5f4803894cc07c4711006ce6794df9a99cacfef95d37f71428bceb170f9ca2b3c9b9bc7c8b0b5411b
praised Secretary of Veterans Affairs Dr. David Shulkin for announcing the historic modernization of the VA's medical records system.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a17d3c2b1e2bc5b7e5f4803894cc07c4711006ce6794df9a99cacfef95d37f71428bceb170f9ca2b3c9b9bc7c8b0b5411b

Yesterday, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a18ad3a520db028915078470d10d21be6201828ec0859038a91fa514883f2157b2d7133eccf55c636507bd6641b53f2cd1
hosted a White House reception to honor Gold Star families.

Yesterday, Vice President Pence
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a18d8046b8e9f26e6345bc37cf7ef298e19e12540b05784f6d6519be2705013f03e7beaa562368959fdad04b06b8cb863a
met with the Prime Minister of Montenegro, Dusko Markovic, to congratulate him on Montenegro’s NATO accession and express the United States’ commitment to NATO and its collective defense obligations.

Yesterday, Vice President Pence
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a1ac2e2dfcd6765bb829c1425faf99e3707e89ebde12bab45f03e4926a53465d0c06e3a5eb74a7bdb6ca409141e27de4f5
held a listening session with women small business owners to discuss the burden of Obamacare.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a1a536dcc029faea246feade511c6585f4e07d771ebfa608ebd666da932f5575e32ad010ea73ef12aebdf11c91fc895132

What We Are Reading

"The President endorsed spinning off air-traffic control from the Federal Aviation Administration, a decades-old idea that would improve passenger experience and safety"
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a16049c44d49176cada98c658c38975133a11cc3572b056ad5a11c32f2a54960403b9047e5f35fcf56621028c99e26638d
The Wall Street Journal

“Privatizing air traffic control isn't a new, or untested idea. It has a proven track record of success around the world, and it's long past time for the U.S. to follow suit.” -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a1bcec5dc5c4079da14c828d0fd18f2bb7c753d006b9648a13960c93293925a5dfc00701ba9eec828e0d77b0191bf698eb
Investor's Business Daily

"On Monday, President Trump endorsed getting the job done by creating a private, non-profit corporation that would apply business principles and provide a steady stream of financing. This change would free air traffic control modernization from two major sources of delay: the bureaucratic process used to select contractors, and Congress’ crazy, on-again, off-again budget process that disrupts long-term planning." -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a117ffa80f50e2d7af89f890124b6388ce99f6320f42e957a7b3fc34eb0b7e0908df29914d31e835b62e32fa44fbfbf0cb
USA Today

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a1a385f22186966c96ae6fe8831ad683faab0c7cb6c1fc9db58d470458f63885baf0eaa8effc56917fc77623da7d461483
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ec3dc3c41be64a1b3aa4fe492317c2107725a5cc2fac6dbc62c659722b4005cb96d3236d0835f8639fa97b95ace5696327341ff001eb314
Contact the White House |

DeVos was only confirmed because Vice President Pence cast a tie-breaking vote to shore up the Trump administration's extreme, backwards plan to undermine our public schools.
Today, she's in the Senate defending the dangerous, massive education cuts she and Trump are trying to ram through.
[**Add your name now to tell Senate Republicans that you oppose DeVos's plan to funnel money away from public education programs to prop up corporate special interests.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeb7/2a380d31/1beeb910/fe8181/3639665248/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170606_DeVos-Senate?source=e20170606_devos1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")

name: Catalina Velasquez
subject: Join us at the Equality March
body:
members of the LGBTQ+ communities, their loved ones, and allies will gather in Washington, D.C.
#
Friends,
LGBTQ+ people have seen historic progress in the last decade. It's easy to assume we've overcome our biggest obstacles, or that the increased access to economic and civil rights for some of us is enough to satisfy our cry for justice for all. But there's still much more we must do. Every day our community faces hostile rhetoric, discriminatory policies, and violence.
This Sunday, June 11, members of the LGBTQ+ communities, their loved ones, and allies will gather in Washington, D.C., and cities across the country, to give voice to these concerns, and to support, uplift, and bring attention to those who have been actively silenced and neglected. The Equality March for Unity & Pride is a grassroots movement that will celebrate, inspire, and mobilize the diverse LGBTQ+ communities to clearly and peacefully oppose efforts to persecute and discriminate against LGBTQ+ individuals.
[**Will you stand up for LGBTQ+ equality by marching with Our Revolution at Sunday's Equality March for Unity & Pride?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dbb/43f17890/d238aa75/620370f3/60423450/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg57s?source=em170606-dc")
[**Equality March for Unity & Pride**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dbb/43f17890/d238aa75/620370f3/60423450/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg57s?source=em170606-dc")
Farragut Square
17th St NW & I St NW, Washington, DC 20006
Sunday, June 11, 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM EDT
We're asking _you_ to join us, because it's our time. Our time to lift up the voices of marginalized people in our communities. Our time to stand up and be counted in this moment of political reckoning in the public consciousness. Our time to assert who we are and our values. Our time to show this country, and the world, that the LGBTQ+ community is not done, we are not satisfied, we are not resigned, and we will not be complicit in the relentless assault against our friends and families. It's our time to march.
[**It's our time to march and fight to affirm and protect the rights, safety, and humanity of the LGBTQ+ community. Will you join us?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dbb/43f17890/d238aa75/620370f3/60423450/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg57s?source=em170606-dc")
With your help we can end discrimination in all forms.
En solidaridad,
Catalina Velasquez
Our Revolution Board Member
**[JOIN THE MARCH»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dbb/43f17890/d238aa75/620370f3/60423450/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg57s?source=em170606-dc")**

This Sunday, June 11, members of the LGBTQ+ communities, their loved ones, and allies will gather in Washington, D.C., and cities across the country, to give voice to these concerns, and to support, uplift, and bring attention to those who have been actively silenced and neglected. The Equality March for Unity & Pride is a grassroots movement that will celebrate, inspire, and mobilize the diverse LGBTQ+ communities to clearly and peacefully oppose efforts to persecute and discriminate against LGBTQ+ individuals. "" "" Farragut Square 17th St NW & I St NW, Washington, DC 20006 Sunday, June 11, 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM EDT We're asking you to join us, because it's our time. Our time to lift up the voices of marginalized people in our communities. Our time to stand up and be counted in this moment of political reckoning in the public consciousness. Our time to assert who we are and our values. Our time to show this country, and the world, that the LGBTQ+ community is not done, we are not satisfied, we are not resigned, and we will not be complicit in the relentless assault against our friends and families. It's our time to march. "" With your help we can end discrimination in all forms. subject: [Signature needed] Protect birth control from Trump
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c79ab/24c69fd9/e09cf633/18e46e8d/2167730925/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE606N_digital_email_20170606_TrumpContraception_inact&source=WQENE606N_digital_email_20170606_TrumpContraception_inact")
---

Peter,

President Trump is going after women's health care AGAIN.

His newest attack on women: making birth control wildly expensive.

A leaked proposal previewed changes that would roll back an Obama rule that requires most employer-based health insurance plans to cover birth control at no cost. Instead, employers across the country could cut birth control coverage from their insurance plans for _any_ religious or moral reason they want, and costs for women could shoot up by hundreds or thousands of dollars.

**[Add your name if you're ready to fight any Trump proposal that would make birth control unaffordable for women across America.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c79ab/24c69fd9/e09cf633/18e46e8e/2167730925/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170605_email_TrumpContraceptionSO?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+if+youre+ready+to+fight+an&utm_campaign=WQENE606N_digital_email_20170606_TrumpContraception_inact&source=WQENE606N_digital_email_20170606_TrumpContraception_inact")**

As an original part of Obamacare, the birth control mandate has been hugely effective, coinciding with a drop in unintended pregnancy nationwide. Fifty-five million women now have coverage without paying out of pocket. And in 2013 alone, the mandate collectively saved women $1.4 BILLION on birth control pills.

Religious organizations, and thanks to the Supreme Court's _Hobby Lobby_ decision, even private companies with strong religious beliefs could file paperwork to opt out of covering birth control. But now Trump wants to let ANY employer decide whether or not their workers can access birth control.

It should go without saying, but there is no world in which your boss should be making decisions about what birth control you can and cannot access. Yet that's the world Trump and his fellow Republicans would create.

**Together, we can show Donald Trump and his cronies that they can't come for women's health care without a fight. Add your name if you're ready to fight this outrageous proposal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Protect-Birth-Control](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c79ab/24c69fd9/e09cf633/18e46e8f/2167730925/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170605_email_TrumpContraceptionSO?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgProtectBirthCont&utm_campaign=WQENE606N_digital_email_20170606_TrumpContraception_inact&source=WQENE606N_digital_email_20170606_TrumpContraception_inact")**

Thank you,

Leila McDowell
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Protect our water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2627/7377f838/364a4a7f/51fb7854/535702563/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

For 40 million people in the United States, the Great Lakes are a way of life. We rely on them for everything from clean drinking water and good-paying jobs to recreation with our families. And since 2010, we've worked to combat the greatest threats facing the Lakes through the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative.

President Trump, however, proposed a budget that would put all that in danger. He'd almost completely defund the Initiative and make deep cuts that would **endanger the health and livelihoods of countless people and communities in Indiana.**

**That 's why I'm asking you to join me in speaking out against his dangerous budget, Peter. [Will you add your name to urge President Trump to protect our drinking water by funding the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2627/7377f838/364a4a7f/51fb7857/535702563/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-joe-urge-president-trump-to-protect-great-lakes-funding")**

Make no mistake about it: When funding for programs that combat pollution is cut, our citizens suffer.

**We cannot allow our citizens to fall by the wayside in favor of budget cuts. That 's why I'm standing up and urging President Trump to stop threatening the health and livelihoods of Hoosiers and other residents of the Great Lakes states. [Add your name to stand with me in calling on President Trump to protect our water.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2627/7377f838/364a4a7f/51fb7857/535702563/VEsF/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-joe-urge-president-trump-to-protect-great-lakes-funding")**

Sincerely,

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: I need your help to hold the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
This is important: I'm asking you to show you're in the fight with us against President Trump and his allies in Congress.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170606-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team, it's hard to remember a time when there were so many outrageous stories in the news.

And yet, there's never been a more critical time for us to stay focused.

All of this Trump chaos is seen as a gift by the GOP. In fact, the GOP is counting on the smoke and mirrors of this administration to distract us from the real agenda they are working on (behind closed doors, of course).

But if we take our eyes off the fights in front of us -- health care for 23 million Americans, billions of dollars for Medicaid and Social Security, and progress for working families -- could all be lost just to give more tax breaks to millionaires and billionaires.

[**So I 'm asking, team. Will you to chip in $1 to help us stay focused on the fights ahead? Your gift will help show that grassroots Democrats reject the Trump and GOP agenda AND support our candidates across the country.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170606-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

In a 24-hour window, we saw how much damage President Trump can do -- his historic mistake to deny climate change and pull the U.S. out of the Paris agreement spells disaster for our children and grandchildren, and our global standing.

There is one way to correct for President Trump's failures -- and that is to stay focused on electing Democrats and keeping our senators fighting on the frontlines.

That's why I'm asking for your help, whatever you can give right now, to show you're with us in these fights and make sure we have the resources we need.

**Even $1 makes a big difference. Please, make a donation right now:**
